description: Plugin manifest has no entries/commands/skills array; automation cannot enumerate exposed surfaces without a filesystem scan
suggested_fix: Add an entries array listing the skills paths relative to the plugin root

description: Skill name field is 'clickup' while package name, plugin manifest name, and directory are all 'clickup-cli'
suggested_fix: Add a comment in frontmatter clarifying the intentional short-name alias, or align name to 'clickup-cli'

description: Step 3 of 'New unit test' says 'edge cases' without defining what constitutes an edge case for this codebase
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete examples such as 'Test with missing optional flags, invalid task IDs, and API error responses'

description: Production dependency @inquirer/prompts uses '^8.3.0'; minor-version bumps are auto-applied on fresh installs
suggested_fix: Pin to exact version '8.3.0' or use npm shrinkwrap for distribution

description: Production dependency chalk uses '^5.6.2'; minor-version bumps are auto-applied on fresh installs
Production dependency commander uses '^14.0.3'; minor-version bumps are auto-applied on fresh installs
